metadata.text_type: Pyramid Texts, Coffin Texts, Book of the Dead

accuracy_notice.warning: Egyptian hieroglyphs are LARGELY PLACEHOLDER, not actual text from manuscripts
accuracy_notice.recommendation: DO NOT USE for academic purposes. Consult Thesaurus Linguae Aegyptiae.
scholarly_sources: Faulkner, R.O. (1972). The Ancient Egyptian Book of the Dead. British Museum.
Allen, J.P. (2015). The Ancient Egyptian Pyramid Texts. SBL Press.
Barguet, P. (1967). Le Livre des Morts des Anciens Égyptiens. Éditions du Cerf.

texts.text_name_en: Book of the Dead - Chapter 125 (Declaration of Innocence)

verification_required.hieroglyphs: REQUIRES Egyptologist verification - current glyphs are placeholders
verification_required.transliteration: Requires comparison with TLA (Thesaurus Linguae Aegyptiae)
verification_required.translation: Multiple translations exist - compare Faulkner, Allen, Barguet
verification_required.dating: Pyramid Texts (2400-2300 BCE), Coffin Texts (2100-1800 BCE), Book of Dead (1550-50 BCE)
